Plaintiffs' supplemental opposition is due on 9/20, defendant's supplemental reply due 9/27. Hearing is continued to September 29, 2011 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 220. Either party may request the transcript pursuant to Judge Sullivan's order re: confidentiality. Defendant has to obtain agreement with plaintiffs before adding new cases to this hearing.
